window_summary: This window tracks the recent carbon-language/carbon-lang nightly release stream from 2026-05-04 to 2026-06-02, covering toolchain improvements, infrastructure updates, and documentation changes.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.04
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.04
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.04; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-04T03:20:02Z; created_at: 2026-05-02T01:12:04Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Simplify logic a little. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7153
* Simplify type check. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7155
* Add a colon to the dump output for IdentifiedFacetType by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7150
* Remove redundant call. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7156
* Properly diagnose ambiguous `.Self` in `T impls X where...` by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7132
* Import dynamic-ness of a C++ class by @dwblaikie in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7141
* Factor out definition merging logic. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7154
* Simplify struct literal pop loop. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7158
### Infrastructure changes :building_construction:
* Let lldb dump display a variable when its name matches an id type name by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7148
* Split arguments ignoring extra whitespace in lldb dump by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7149
* Don't identify sibling PRs as dependencies. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7145
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.01...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.04
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.04, the toolchain and implementation changes include simplifying logic, adding a colon to dump output for IdentifiedFacetType, removing a redundant call, properly diagnosing ambiguous `.Self` in `T impls X where...`, importing dynamic-ness of a C++ class, factoring out definition merging logic, and simplifying struct literal pop loop. Infrastructure changes include letting lldb dump display a variable when its name matches an id type name, splitting arguments ignoring extra whitespace in lldb dump, and not identifying sibling PRs as dependencies.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.05
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.05
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.05; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-05T03:30:06Z; created_at: 2026-05-04T21:50:13Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Give the `.Self` instruction a location by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7147
* Make choice to replace only implicit `.Self` or all into a parameter of SubstPeriodSelfCallbacks by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7133
* Don't consider designators in a nested facet type as constraining the current type by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7139
* Do not treat impls in different scopes as redeclarations by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7161
* Support calling Carbon destructors from C++ by @nicholasbishop in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7143
* Fix crash if an inst in a pending block needs a cleanup. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7166
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.02...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.05
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.05, the toolchain and implementation changes include giving the `.Self` instruction a location, making the choice to replace only implicit `.Self` or all into a parameter of SubstPeriodSelfCallbacks, not considering designators in a nested facet type as constraining the current type, not treating impls in different scopes as redeclarations, supporting calling Carbon destructors from C++, and fixing a crash if an inst in a pending block needs a cleanup.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.08
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.08
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.08; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-08T03:32:39Z; created_at: 2026-05-07T22:33:47Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Detect impl redecls in non-declarative scopes by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7170
* Implement `BundleStore` by @geoffromer in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7173
* Mangle the signature decl when mangling a thunk. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7177
* Search all facets in the impl lookup query for witnesses by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7178
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.07...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.08
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.08, the toolchain and implementation changes include detecting impl redecls in non-declarative scopes, implementing `BundleStore`, mangling the signature decl when mangling a thunk, and searching all facets in the impl lookup query for witnesses.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.09
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.09
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.09; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-09T03:31:43Z; created_at: 2026-05-08T22:38:34Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Replace manual `CoreInterface` tables with x-macros by @cjdb in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7176
* return 0 from `Run` when it doesn't specify a return value by @lnihlen in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7180
* Add regression test for var parameter cleanup from struct literals by @hystericca in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7175
### Documentation changes :memo:
* Add sufficiency of declaration to the information accumulation principle by @josh11b in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7179
## New Contributors
* @hystericca made their first contribution in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7175
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.08...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.09
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.09, the toolchain and implementation changes include replacing manual `CoreInterface` tables with x-macros, returning 0 from `Run` when it doesn't specify a return value, and adding a regression test for var parameter cleanup from struct literals. Documentation changes include adding sufficiency of declaration to the information accumulation principle. A new contributor @hystericca made their first contribution.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.12
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.12
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.12; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-12T03:32:00Z; created_at: 2026-05-11T19:01:24Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Correctly handle ImplWitnessAccess in impl lookup by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7181
* Roundtrip (export/reimport) class declarations by @dwblaikie in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7182
* Import C++ vtables by @dwblaikie in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7174
* Add `check/dump.cpp` functions for the new ones in `sem_ir` by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7126
### Infrastructure changes :building_construction:
* Remove some more checks that are noisy in our codebase. by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7189
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.11...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.12
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.12, the toolchain and implementation changes include correctly handling ImplWitnessAccess in impl lookup, roundtripping (export/reimport) class declarations, importing C++ vtables, and adding `check/dump.cpp` functions for the new ones in `sem_ir`. Infrastructure changes include removing some more checks that are noisy in the codebase.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.13
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.13
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-13T03:32:52Z; created_at: 2026-05-13T01:44:07Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Proposals accepted and merged :scroll:
* Updating `self` syntax and adding `static` member variables by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7016
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Remove completed TODO in import test by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7193
* Relax alias restrictions. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7190
* Support detecting `begin()`/`end()` methods for range-for loops by @cjdb in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7185
* Add tests that demonstrate missing diagnostics for `impl as` a named constraint by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7195
* Support pass-by-move when calling a C++ function taking by value. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7135
### Infrastructure changes :building_construction:
* Bump urllib3 from 2.6.3 to 2.7.0 in /github_tools in the pip group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7187
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.12...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13, proposals accepted and merged include updating `self` syntax and adding `static` member variables. Toolchain and implementation changes include removing a completed TODO in import test, relaxing alias restrictions, supporting detecting `begin()`/`end()` methods for range-for loops, adding tests that demonstrate missing diagnostics for `impl as` a named constraint, and supporting pass-by-move when calling a C++ function taking by value. Infrastructure changes include bumping urllib3 from 2.6.3 to 2.7.0 in /github_tools in the pip group across 1 directory.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.14
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.14
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-14T03:36:50Z; created_at: 2026-05-14T00:38:24Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Tidy up virtual method tests. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7196
* Resolve cycles in `.Self` replacement in nested designators by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7183
* Don't re-require complete types for extended scopes by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7194
* Support signature mismatch between `virtual fn` and `override fn`. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7198
* Export Carbon classes as base / final / abstract. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7191
* Avoid replacing .Self in designators more robustly in rewrite constraints by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7202
* Replace `.Self` in the self type of `T(.Self) impls NamedConstraint` when identifying a facet type by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7204
* Parse vars in classes the same as vars in other locations by @nicholasbishop in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7188
* Handle "gaps" in C++ vtables. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7206
### Documentation changes :memo:
* Update examples throughout the design for p7016 by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7200
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14, the toolchain and implementation changes include tidying up virtual method tests, resolving cycles in `.Self` replacement in nested designators, not re-requiring complete types for extended scopes, supporting signature mismatch between `virtual fn` and `override fn`, exporting Carbon classes as base / final / abstract, avoiding replacing .Self in designators more robustly in rewrite constraints, replacing `.Self` in the self type of `T(.Self) impls NamedConstraint` when identifying a facet type, parsing vars in classes the same as vars in other locations, and handling "gaps" in C++ vtables. Documentation changes include updating examples throughout the design for p7016.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.15
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.15
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.15; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-15T03:32:44Z; created_at: 2026-05-14T20:22:32Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Switch the `ValueStore`-related templates to use explicit instantiation by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7116
* Use early rewrites in compound member access by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7207
* Use impl's interface to get the specific interface from the identified facet type by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7201
* Fix calls to functions with `const T&&` parameters. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7208
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.15
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.15, the toolchain and implementation changes include switching the `ValueStore`-related templates to use explicit instantiation, using early rewrites in compound member access, using impl's interface to get the specific interface from the identified facet type, and fixing calls to functions with `const T&&` parameters.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.16
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.16
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.16; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-16T03:28:48Z; created_at: 2026-05-15T23:53:12Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Gracefully handle a concrete ImplWitnessAccess in the type structure by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7214
* Makes impls constraints available to use in later constraints within a facet type by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7209
* Centralize benchmarking infrastructure and the toolchain-wide benchmarks by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7212
* Resolve nested ImplWitnessAccesses in rewrite constraints by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7213
* Restructure scrutinee type handling by @geoffromer in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7216
* Export virtual functions when exporting a class definition by @dwblaikie in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7210
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.15...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.16
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.16, the toolchain and implementation changes include gracefully handling a concrete ImplWitnessAccess in the type structure, making impls constraints available to use in later constraints within a facet type, centralizing benchmarking infrastructure and the toolchain-wide benchmarks, resolving nested ImplWitnessAccesses in rewrite constraints, restructuring scrutinee type handling, and exporting virtual functions when exporting a class definition.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.19
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.19
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.19; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-19T05:30:26Z; created_at: 2026-05-19T03:05:31Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Export virtual/abstract/override functions as virtual by @dwblaikie in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7211
* Update LLVM by @josh11b in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7221
* Implement `static var` class fields by @nicholasbishop in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7215
* Fix passing mode computation for methods. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7225
* Support use of Carbon toolchain as a bazel module by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7223
* Add C++ compile benchmarking by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7220
* Add missing library line to test. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7227
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.18...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.19
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.19, the toolchain and implementation changes include exporting virtual/abstract/override functions as virtual, updating LLVM, implementing `static var` class fields, fixing passing mode computation for methods, supporting use of Carbon toolchain as a bazel module, adding C++ compile benchmarking, and adding a missing library line to test.

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Support unqualified lookup into extended interfaces from classes and impls by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7217
* Add a text mode for fingerprinting. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7231
### Infrastructure changes :building_construction:
* Optimize pre-commit checks by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7229
* Explicitly escape leading `-` by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7226
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.19...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.20
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.20, the toolchain and implementation changes include supporting unqualified lookup into extended interfaces from classes and impls and adding a text mode for fingerprinting. Infrastructure changes include optimizing pre-commit checks and explicitly escaping leading `-`.

## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Add a failing test for Clang modules support. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7233
* Fix crash in indirect template instantiation. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7240
* Fix cross-package signature mismatches. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7232
* Basic support for use of C++ modules via interop. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7241
### Infrastructure changes :building_construction:
* Bump idna from 3.7 to 3.15 in /github_tools in the pip group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7234
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.20...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.21
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.21, the toolchain and implementation changes include adding a failing test for Clang modules support, fixing a crash in indirect template instantiation, fixing cross-package signature mismatches, and adding basic support for use of C++ modules via interop. chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.28
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: carbon-language/carbon-lang
Release: Nightly build 2026.05.28
Tag: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.28; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-28T03:23:54Z; created_at: 2026-05-27T23:18:27Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Handle errors and non-constant instructions when substituting non-canonical instructions by @danakj in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7262
* Fix off-by-one errors in LanguageServer's GetRange by @DavidLoftus in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7251
* Make `Optional(T)` copyable.  by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7268
* Don't convert runtime arguments during deduction. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7265
* Only propagate `.Self` dependence in facet types from extended constraints by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7253
* Implement `char` operations from #6710 by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7266
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.27...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.28
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.28, the toolchain and implementation changes include handling errors and non-constant instructions when substituting non-canonical instructions, fixing off-by-one errors in LanguageServer's GetRange, making `Optional(T)` copyable, not converting runtime arguments during deduction, only propagating `.Self` dependence in facet types from extended constraints, and implementing `char` operations from #6710.

chunks.title: Nightly build 2026.05.29

Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yaml at trunk -->
## What's Changed
### Proposals accepted and merged :scroll:
* Make proposal filenames use 6 digits and include the title by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7245
### Toolchain and implementation changes :hammer_and_wrench:
* Switch to `uv` for all of our Python scripts by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7242
### Documentation changes :memo:
* Add skills for diagnostics and builtin functions. by @zygoloid in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7277
### Utilities :triangular_ruler:
* Bump tmp from 0.2.5 to 0.2.7 in /utils/vscode in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7274
### Infrastructure changes :building_construction:
* Add the `uv` release endpoint by @chandlerc in https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/pull/7276
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/carbon-language/carbon-lang/compare/v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.28...v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.29
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.29, proposals accepted and merged include making proposal filenames use 6 digits and include the title. Toolchain and implementation changes include switching to `uv` for all Python scripts. Documentation changes include adding skills for diagnostics and builtin functions. Utilities changes include bumping tmp from 0.2.5 to 0.2.7 in /utils/vscode in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory. Infrastructure changes include adding the `uv` release endpoint.

Documentation changes include updating design docs for proposal #6710: `char` redesign.

questions.query_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang releases, which release includes the addition of a text mode for fingerprinting?

answer_support.answer_text: adding a text mode for fingerprinting

questions.query_text: Across the carbon-language/carbon-lang releases, how does the change described in v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13 differ from the change described in v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14 regarding `self` syntax?

options.text: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13 updates `self` syntax and adds `static` member variables, while v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14 updates examples throughout the design for that proposal.
v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13 removes `self` syntax, while v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14 adds it back.
Both releases only update documentation without any toolchain changes.
v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13 adds `static` member variables, while v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14 removes them.

questions.expected_answer: v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.13 updates `self` syntax and adds `static` member variables, while v0.0.0-0.nightly.2026.05.14 updates examples throughout the design for that proposal.

answer_support.answer_text: Updating `self` syntax and adding `static` member variables
Update examples throughout the design for p7016

questions.query_text: In the carbon-language/carbon-lang release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds support for field initializers, (2) a release that implements `static var` class fields, (3) a release that adds FieldStore and fixes field initializer imports.

answer_support.answer_text: Add FieldStore and fix field initializer imports
